name: Shane & Shane
years: Shane Barnard: December 11, 1975 – present; Shane Everett: 1978 – present
title: Worship Duo
tagline: Scripture-saturated worship that draws believers deeper into God's Word
bio: Christian worship duo consisting of Shane Barnard and Shane Everett, known for their scripture-based worship music. They lead worship at The Porch at Watermark Community Church in Dallas, Texas, and have released numerous albums emphasizing the Psalms and other biblical texts set to music.
faith: Shane & Shane are committed to creating worship music rooted directly in Scripture, often setting entire Psalm passages to melody. Their ministry reflects a deep conviction that God's Word should be central in corporate worship and personal devotion. They have discipled a generation of young believers through their ministry at The Porch and their extensive catalog of scripture songs.

sources.title: Shane & Shane — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Christian worship duo
